back_translation: A song of ascents. Of David. O LORD, my heart is not proud, and my eyes are not haughty; I do not concern myself with great matters, or things too lofty for me.
Surely I have calmed and quieted my soul, like a weaned child with its mother; like a weaned child is my soul within me.
O Israel, put your hope in the LORD, both now and forevermore.
